name: Observability & Monitoring Stack
description: Splunk platform health, APM, synthetic monitoring, and log aggregation — indexer queues, search performance, and forwarder health.
quickTip: Use the Monitoring Console (MC) built into Splunk and supplement with _internal index searches.

subcategories.name: Splunk ITSI (Premium)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk IT Service Intelligence (Premium), Content Pack for Monitoring and Alerting.

subcategories.name: Third-Party Monitoring Integration
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom webhook/API inputs, Prometheus remote write receiver, SNMP trap receiver. Integration patterns for legacy NMS (Nagios, Icinga, Zabbix, SolarWinds, CA Nimsoft DX UIM, Microsoft SCOM, IBM Tivoli Netcool/OMNIbus), modern observability SaaS (Datadog, Dynatrace, New Relic, AppDynamics, Elastic, Grafana Cloud), and on-call paging (PagerDuty, Opsgenie, Splunk On-Call, xMatters).

subcategories.name: AI & LLM Observability
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector with GenAI semantic conventions, Azure OpenAI / OpenAI log exports, custom HEC for LLM gateways (LiteLLM, LangSmith, Portkey, Helicone), ESCU (Splunk Enterprise Security Content Update), Microsoft 365 / Copilot audit connectors, Anthropic / Bedrock / Vertex AI billing exports, vector database telemetry (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant).

subcategories.name: OpenTelemetry, Observability Pipelines & SRE Patterns
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Distribution of OpenTelemetry Collector, Splunk Observability Cloud (APM, RUM, Synthetics, Infrastructure Monitoring, Log Observer Connect), Prometheus, Jaeger, Grafana. SRE patterns: SLO/error-budget burn rate, RED/USE/Four Golden Signals, sampling strategies, semantic conventions.

subcategories.name: Grafana Operations
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Universal Forwarder for Grafana access / backend / audit logs, Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector for Grafana /metrics scrape (Prometheus exposition), Splunk Add-on for Prometheus / OpenMetrics (Splunkbase 4923) as alternative metrics path. Covers Grafana OSS / Enterprise / Cloud — dashboard render, datasource queries, Unified Alerting (ngalert), plugin signing, RBAC drift, public dashboard exposure, annotation storms, Loki cardinality.
subcategories.dataSources: Grafana log files (`/var/log/grafana/grafana.log`, `/var/log/grafana/grafana_audit.log`) tailed by UF — sourcetypes `grafana:access`, `grafana:logs`, `grafana:audit`, `grafana:notifier`. Grafana Prometheus `/metrics` endpoint scraped by OTel into `observability_metrics` index — sourcetype `grafana:metrics`. Optional Splunk RUM (`splunk_rum:span`) or synthetic browser ingest (`browser:synthetic`) tagged `service=grafana_ui`. Lookups `grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv` and CMDB `grafana_dashboard_metadata` for owner / SLA / business-priority enrichment.

subcategories.name: Fluentd & Fluent Bit Health
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector scraping Fluentd `monitor_agent` (port 24220) and Prometheus exposition (port 24231), Fluent Bit `[HTTP_SERVER]` (`/api/v2/metrics/prometheus`, port 2020), Splunk Universal Forwarder tailing Fluentd / Fluent Bit supervisor and worker logs, Splunk Connect for Kubernetes (Fluentd-based) HEC output telemetry, Calyptia (commercial Fluent Bit) telemetry. Covers buffer overflow, retry exhaustion, output plugin errors, throughput parity, worker crash, multiline parser stuck state, hot-reload configuration governance.
subcategories.dataSources: Fluentd `monitor_agent` JSON output (`/api/plugins.json`) and Prometheus exposition (`fluentd_output_status_buffer_queue_length`, `fluentd_output_status_buffer_total_bytes_total`, `fluentd_output_status_retry_count`, `fluentd_input_status_emit_records`, `fluentd_output_status_write_count`, `fluentd_output_status_emit_count`) into `observability_metrics`. Fluent Bit `/api/v2/metrics/prometheus` (`fluentbit_output_proc_records_total`, `fluentbit_output_proc_bytes_total`, `fluentbit_output_errors_total`, `fluentbit_output_retries_total`, `fluentbit_output_retries_failed_total`, `fluentbit_storage_chunks_*`). Fluentd / Fluent Bit log files tailed by UF — sourcetypes `fluentd:supervisor`, `fluentd:worker`, `fluent_bit:metrics`, `fluent_bit:storage`, `fluent_bit:upstream`, `sck:fluentd:emit`, `sck:fluentd:hec`. Lookups `fluentd_pipeline_owner.csv` and `fluent_bit_input_to_output.csv` for ownership and topology enrichment.
